title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Paytm Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Paytm Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Ventures Solutions:
Paytm Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Ventures Solutions!
